hooks.command: cmd=$(echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print(d.get('command',''))" 2>/dev/null); if echo "$cmd" | grep -qE 'rm -rf /|git push --force|git reset --hard|git branch -D|DROP TABLE'; then echo "Blocked: potentially destructive command detected. Confirm with user."; exit 2; fi
